utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 required items in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification: Each of the first three requires coverage type and costs; they include plan names, descriptions aligned to required coverage, and monthly costs—so fully specified. Additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs; the plan mentions included services but does not specify their costs beyond stating they replace a previous €50/month service—no explicit cost figure for the new services, so not fully specified with costs. Total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; it provides monthly figures (new total, previous, savings) but no annual breakdown—thus not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three plan names: PrimeCare Wellness Package (health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (property), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel). We must match these to the closest exact names in the ground-truth ratings. EliteHome Premium Coverage and PrimeTravel Premium Plan match exactly, so we use their ratings. The health item 'PrimeCare Wellness Package' does not exist verbatim in the ground truth. The ground truth has PrimeCare Premium Plan in both physical and mental health, each rated 10. Since the final plan describes 'Physical and mental health insurance' under one PrimeCare-branded package, the appropriate mapping is to PrimeCare Premium Plan. We then provide the exact ratings.
